name: site
locked_definition: One row per approved acquisition and clinical-use site

name: tissue_or_tumor
locked_definition: Approved intended-use tissue and tumor ontology
clinical_disposition: worst supported group must meet approved criteria

name: scanner
locked_definition: Manufacturer model firmware and acquisition software combination

name: stain
locked_definition: Approved stain protocol laboratory and batch envelope

name: nucleus_density
locked_definition: Development-set locked density cut points per physical area
clinical_disposition: dense worst group requires explicit acceptance

name: image_boundary
locked_definition: Reference instance intersects the analyzed image boundary
clinical_disposition: review or exclusion follows approved labeling

name: internal_tile_seam
locked_definition: Reference instance intersects a model tile seam while remaining internal to source image

name: touching_or_confluent
locked_definition: Qualified pathologist label or locked adjacency/density rule
clinical_disposition: material failure blocks supported dense cases

name: blur_or_out_of_focus
locked_definition: Locked focus-quality threshold and pathology review

name: tissue_fold
locked_definition: Pathologist-confirmed fold or locked QC definition

name: debris_or_bubble
locked_definition: Pathologist-confirmed debris bubble or coverslip contaminant

name: compression
locked_definition: Locked supported codec and compression-quality envelope

name: stain_shift
locked_definition: Locked color/stain envelope derived only from development data

name: tissue_tear
locked_definition: Pathologist-confirmed tear chatter or sectioning defect

name: unsupported_input
locked_definition: Input violates any locked specimen stain scanner resolution or quality requirement
